name: daily-briefing-builder
description: Daily Briefing Builder MCP App - Gmail + Calendar + Drive morning dashboard

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch" "npm run serve"
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.start:stdio: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build 1>&2 && tsx main.ts --stdio
